creator: cyberlab@gmx.de
text:
I tried to install 13.0-CURRENT-powerpc-powerpc64-20190801-r350491 on a Powermac 7,2 (G5), but it freezes in the boot process. Last console message is:

cryptosoft0: <software crypto> on nexus0

boot -v gives me:

crypto: cryptosoft0 registers alg 31 flags 0 maxoplen 0
crypto: cryptosoft0 registers alg 40 flags 0 maxoplen 0
crypto: cryptosoft0 registers alg 39 flags 0 maxoplen 0
crypto: cryptosoft0 registers alg 38 flags 0 maxoplen 0

then it stops.
